_comment: A/B hypothesis presets for /t/:id. Each entry bundles the levers that flow into the generator (STRAT_HOOK_ANGLE/OPEN_STYLE/MAX_WORDS) and renderer (STRAT_HOOK_CARD_SECS). 'section' is the ebook query ('random' or a partial title). Add/edit freely — the server reads this file per request, no restart needed.

t1.label: Control — current baseline
t1.hypothesis: The tuned baseline (grounded open, curiosity loop, ~90 words, 2s hook card) is the reference everything else is measured against.

t2.label: Ultra-short punch
t2.hypothesis: Cutting runtime hard (~55 words) lifts completion rate and therefore reach, even if absolute watch time per view drops.

t3.label: Boundary-guilt locked
t3.hypothesis: Forcing the proven boundary->apology angle every time beats random angle selection on skip rate and saves.
t3.hookAngle: the second right after she set a boundary — when the apology came tumbling out unprompted

t4.label: Whisper throwback (old style)
t4.hypothesis: The original intimate whisper-open does NOT actually hurt retention versus the grounded open — control test to confirm the change was worth it.

t5.label: Long hook hold
t5.hypothesis: Holding the full hook on screen longer (3s) gives slower readers time to absorb it and lowers the 3-second skip.
t5.hookAngle: the over-explaining spiral: she answered 'no' and then kept justifying it nobody asked
